name: Dropbox Sign (HelloSign)
description: Drive Dropbox Sign (e-signature, formerly HelloSign) from any AI agent: signature requests, templates, signature embeds, downloads. 10 tools, API-key Basic auth.
instructions:
This connector uses the Dropbox Sign API v3 (developers.hellosign.com).

**Setup**:
1. Sign in to https://app.hellosign.com → top-right avatar → **API → Test Mode + Live API → Generate API Key**.
2. Use the test API key during development; switch to live when going to production.
3. Set `DROPBOX_SIGN_API_KEY`.

**Authentication**: HTTP Basic with username=API_KEY, password=empty.

**test_mode**: every write endpoint accepts `test_mode=1` to NOT charge credits / NOT send real signature requests. Always test first.

**Signature Request workflow**:
  1. Create signature request from a template (`create_with_template`) OR from file URLs (`create`).
  2. Recipients receive emails to sign.
  3. Poll `get` to track status (status_code: awaiting_signature, signed, declined, expired).
  4. Download the final PDF after status=signed.

**Embedded signing**: alternative flow where you host the signature UI in your app (no Dropbox Sign emails sent). Requires `embedded_signing_enabled: true` in your account.

**Pagination**: `?page=N&page_size=M` (default 20, max 100).

**Out of scope here**: templates editing (UI), API app management, embedded request URL flows beyond basics, fax, signature accounts setup.

tools.name: dropbox_sign_get_account
tools.description: Return account info: email, role, quotas, callback_url.

tools.name: dropbox_sign_list_signature_requests
tools.description: List signature requests, optionally filtered by account/query.

tools.name: dropbox_sign_get_signature_request
tools.description: Fetch a signature request by ID with full signer state.

tools.name: dropbox_sign_create_signature_request_with_template
tools.description: Create a signature request from a template. Required: template_ids + signers (with role) + subject. Always set test_mode=1 for testing.

signers.description: [{role:'Client', name:'Jane Doe', email_address:'jane@acme.com'}]. Role must match template role names.

test_mode.description: 1 for test (no credits, no real emails). 0 for live.

tools.name: dropbox_sign_send_signature_request
tools.description: Create a signature request from file URLs or uploaded files. Pass file_urls (publicly accessible PDF URLs) or file (multipart — NOT supported here, use file_urls).

use_text_tags.description: If true, parse [sig|...|...] text-tags in the PDF.

hide_text_tags.description: Hide text tags in final PDF.

tools.name: dropbox_sign_send_reminder
tools.description: Send a reminder email to a pending signer.

name.description: Signer name (if multiple signers share email).

tools.name: dropbox_sign_cancel_signature_request
tools.description: Cancel an incomplete signature request. Irreversible.

tools.name: dropbox_sign_download_files
tools.description: Download the final signed PDF (or zip of all docs). Returns binary.

get_url.description: If true, return a temp URL instead of binary.

tools.name: dropbox_sign_list_templates
tools.description: List templates available on the account.

tools.name: dropbox_sign_get_template
tools.description: Fetch a template's details — roles, custom fields, files.
